title: Business Sector Survey
subtitle: Oman Business Intelligence Survey 2026
description: Help us understand your business needs, challenges, and digital readiness. Your responses will shape the solutions we build for Oman's private sector.
resumeInstructions: Enter the token you received when you started the survey.
officeLinkTitle: Sign in to link your Sanad office
officeLinkBody: This survey link is for a specific Sanad office. Sign in with the SmartPRO account you use for that office’s dashboard so your answers are recorded for the correct office.
officeLinkAfterSignIn: After you sign in, you will return here automatically to start and complete the questionnaire.
confidentialNote: All responses are confidential and used only for research purposes.
completeSubtitle: Your response has been submitted successfully.
completeMessage: Your insights will help shape better business solutions for Oman's private sector. We appreciate your time.
whatNextMessage: Our team will review the aggregated survey data and use the insights to develop solutions tailored to Oman's business needs.
surveyNotActive: This survey is not currently active.

admin.topTagsDesc: Tags assigned based on survey answers
admin.lowSampleNote: Based on {{count}} completed response — trends become more reliable with more data.
admin.lowSampleNotePlural: Based on {{count}} completed responses — trends become more reliable with more data.
admin.inviteOutreachLogged: Outreach logged (batch {{batch}}…). Open Follow-up status to see each office.
admin.inviteSanadToastWhatsapp: WhatsApp (Arabic template): {{waSent}} sent, {{waFailed}} failed, {{waNoPhone}} skipped (no valid phone).
admin.inviteSanadConfirm: Send invitation emails to every active Sanad office that has an email on file? Offices without email are not emailed; you can copy their survey links afterward.
admin.sanadOutreachNoEmailDesc: Share each survey link by WhatsApp or phone using the office name and number on file. The link records which Sanad office the response belongs to.
admin.sanadOutreachAllDesc: Per-office survey links for manual outreach. Offices that have an email can also get the link via the Email Sanad offices button.
admin.sanadOutreachEmpty: No active Sanad offices on the platform.
admin.sanadOutreachIntelEmpty: No centres in the imported directory yet. Import centres, link them to active platform offices for survey URLs, or switch list source to “Platform offices (live)”.
admin.sanadOutreachErrorTableHint: Resolve the issue above, then tap Retry, to load rows here.
admin.whatsappSurveyMessage:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This message concerns the official Oman business-sector questionnaire (SmartPRO — “The Smart Delegate” — and the SANAD offices programme). It collects sector information to support planning and official reporting.

Establishment:
{{officeName}}

Direct link to complete the questionnaire in your browser:
{{surveyUrl}}

Thank you for your cooperation.
admin.whatsappOpenHint: Open WhatsApp with this number and a draft message (tap Send in WhatsApp)
admin.whatsappNoPhoneHint: No usable phone on file — add a number or fix format (e.g. +968…)
admin.sanadOutreachIntelDesc: Imported directory: use WhatsApp or Copy per row. Expand “How WhatsApp & Copy work” for step-by-step tips.
admin.sanadIntelTipsToggle: How WhatsApp & Copy work (tap to expand)
admin.sanadIntelOutreachBullet1: Green WhatsApp icon: opens an Arabic draft. You must still tap Send inside WhatsApp.
admin.sanadIntelOutreachBullet2: Badge “Public URL” or “Office URL” shows which link is inside that draft.
admin.sanadIntelOutreachBullet3: “Office URL” / “Public URL” copies the same link as in the WhatsApp draft.
admin.openSanadDirectoryToLink: Open Sanad directory → link a centre to a platform office
admin.sanadIntelOutreachBullet4: “Centre not linked…” is informational: link the centre in Sanad Intelligence for a dedicated URL and auto-attribution.
admin.outreachBindingDedicated: Linked to platform — Copy and WhatsApp both use the dedicated office URL.
admin.outreachBindingUsePublic: Centre not linked on platform yet — Copy and WhatsApp use the same general survey URL until you link this centre.
admin.outreachBindingUsePublicDetail: Copy and WhatsApp use the general survey URL until you link this centre (see link above).
admin.surveyNoteNotLinkedPublicCsv: Centre not linked — survey_url is the general (public) start URL
admin.whatsappDraftReady: Tap icon, then Send in WhatsApp
admin.whatsappSurveyMessageNoOfficeLink:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This message concerns the official Oman business-sector questionnaire (SmartPRO — “The Smart Delegate” — and the SANAD offices programme). It collects sector information to support planning and official reporting.

Establishment:
{{officeName}}

There is not yet a dedicated link that automatically binds your answers to this office on the platform (that appears after the centre is linked to an active SANAD office). You may still begin using the general link below.

To receive the dedicated link when it is ready, please reply on this chat or share an active email address.

General survey link:
{{surveyPublicUrl}}

Thank you for your cooperation.
admin.whatsappSurveyMessageNoLink:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This message concerns the official Oman business-sector questionnaire (SmartPRO — “The Smart Delegate” — and the SANAD offices programme). It collects sector information to support planning and official reporting.

Establishment:
{{officeName}}

No link is included in this draft yet. Please reply on this chat when convenient, or share an active email address, and we will send your establishment’s questionnaire link.

Thank you for your cooperation.
admin.surveyPublicLinkCopyHint: General survey link (no automatic office binding). Link the centre to an active Sanad office for a dedicated URL.
admin.surveyPublicLinkCopied: General survey link copied (use a dedicated link after linking the office on the platform)
admin.surveyLinkUnavailableHint: Link the centre to an active Sanad office to get a survey URL.
admin.followUpDesc: Latest bulk invite per office (from “Email Sanad offices”) and the latest office-linked survey response, if any.
admin.msgVariantDedicatedHint: Dedicated office link — response auto-linked to this office
admin.msgVariantPublicHint: General survey link — no automatic office binding. Link the centre for a dedicated URL.
admin.msgVariantNoLinkHint: No survey link — message asks recipient to reply for a link
